entry.title: Living abroad an exciting, vibrant experience, and I feel incredibly lucky to have it every day. But at the same time, it can also be isolating and lonely. There’s the feeling that you never quite belong where you’re building a new life, but also feel lik

entry.title: I am ✨passive aggressive✨ because I am terrified of confrontation but I don't want people to step all over me 🥰 (there is no excuse to not having connection when you can get @Ubigi App eSIM so easily in over 200 destinations 😤🥴)

entry.title: When all you do is running away, but you keep finding yourself 🤡 Constantly having a flight booked and an @ubigiofficial eSIM active is a lifestyle only truly ✨burnt out✨ people like me can understand 🤭🥵🥹🫶 #Free99 #travel #traveling

entry.title: Vietnam? More like VietNOM NOM NOM 🤤 Had the most delicious time in Vietnam thanks to all of your recs, my friend @BÁ TÙNG for being the best guide ever, and also @Ubigi App for keeping me connected from landing till departure as always ✨

entry.title: As a kid, I couldn't wait to grow up. I thought adulthood meant getting my dream job, finding my soulmate, and living a fulfilled life-as if getting older would magically make it all happen. But after college, I quickly realized adulthood is complicated.
entry.content: As a kid, I couldn't wait to grow up. I thought adulthood meant getting my dream job, finding my soulmate, and living a fulfilled life-as if getting older would magically make it all happen. But after college, I quickly realized adulthood is complicated.

entry.title: #ad Me being forced to work in the office: I would be WAY more productive and focused working from home Me ✨working from home✨: @KAYAK #kayakpartner

entry.title: Honestly whenever someone says “good question”, I never even bother hearing their answer because I’m too busy congratulating myself for asking such a good question 🥺🥰🤭😘 #BetterThanEveryone #BTEFace #MainCharacter #delulu #tiktokusa #fyp #foryou
